badge.label: Wenhai Wetlands And Jade Dragon Nature Reserves | Three-day Ecotour

sections.subtitle: A Slow Trekking Journey of Connection
sections.text:
Embark on an extraordinary, muliti-day hike inspired by our experience with Paul Salopek's epic
"Out of Eden Walk" and National Geographic's "Forever Walk:
China." Trek the very paths we walked and documented in the
acclaimed series. Explore stunning landscapes at Jade Dragon Snow Mountain and
Wenhai Wetlands, discovering rich biodiversity alongside local experts. Immerse
yourself in authentic Naxi and Yi cultures with village stays, sharing meals
and bonfires with locals. Experience the profound journey of slow travel,
connect deeply with nature and culture, and witness the breathtaking beauty of
Yunnan.

*   Duration: Three Days

*   Location: Jade Dragon and Wenhai Wetlands Nature Reserves

*   Activity Level: High

*   Altitudes: 2400 - 3250 m

*   Daily Walking Distance: up to 18 km

*   Price: **from** **USD687.00 to USD506.00 Per Person** (based on group sizes of 2 and 6 people)

badge.label: WENHAI WETLANDS AND JADE DRAGON NATURE RESERVES | THREE-DAY ECOTOUR

items.text:
Walk a renowned section of the "Forever Walk: China" trail, as **documented by National
Geographic**. Immerse yourself in the very landscapes and cultural encounters
that captivated the world in this celebrated documentary series.

Follow a part of Pulitzer Prize winner **Paul Salopek's epic global walk**. Reflect on humanity and
our planet as you trace his path through culturally rich Yunnan, connecting
with the world through mindful exploration on foot.

Discover the remarkable **biodiversity of Wenhai Wetlands** alongside a local conservationist.
Learn about unique species and delicate ecosystems, witnessing firsthand the
importance of conservation efforts in this stunning natural haven.

Experience ****genuine Naxi hospitality with an **overnight stay in Wenhai village**. Share in local
customs, observe daily life, and connect with the warm community, gaining
unique insights into their traditions and way of living.

Uncover the mysteries of Tiger Cave, a fascinating local **geological wonder**. Explore its intriguing
rock formations and delve into the legends surrounding this natural site,
adding an element of adventure to your ecotour.

Journey through **charming minority villages** and tranquil hamlets, each with its own unique
character. Observe diverse architectural styles, local traditions, and the
peaceful rhythm of rural life in Yunnan's diverse communities.

Hike through the **untouched wilderness** of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Nature Reserve accompanied by
a local forest ranger. Explore pristine landscapes, learn about the region’s
ecology, and experience the raw beauty of protected nature.

Immerse yourself in Yi culture with an **overnight stay in Runangu village**. Engage with welcoming
villagers, learn about their distinct customs, and participate in daily life,
fostering genuine cultural exchange and understanding.

Witness the **extraordinary biodiversity of ancient forests** within Jade Dragon Snow Mountain.
Discover a rich tapestry of plant and animal life, appreciating the ecological
significance of Yunnan's primeval forests and their vital role in the
ecosystem.

Gather around a cozy bonfire with local villagers for an evening of cultural connection. Share
stories, laughter, and warmth under the **starry Yunnan sky**, forging memorable
bonds and experiencing genuine local hospitality.

Stand in awe of the majestic Jade Dragon Snow Mountain, its towering peaks dominating the landscape.
Capture **breathtaking panoramic views** and feel the powerful presence of this
iconic natural wonder, a true highlight of Yunnan.

Journey alongside **renowned conservation and ecotourism experts** deeply rooted in Yunnan’s landscapes. Their expertise ensures safety, while their passion for preserving ecosystems and sharing cultural stories turns the journey into an enriching, unforgettable adventure.

badge.label: WENHAI WETLANDS AND JADE DRAGON NATURE RESERVES | THREE-DAY ECOTOUR

title.text: Good to Know Before You Go

sections.text:
**What’s Included:**

*   English-speaking guide (Lukasz Madrzynski).

*   Local guides.

*   Private Transportation.

*   Breakfasts, Lunches, Dinners and snacks.

*   Outdoor travel insurance.

**What’s Not Included:**

*   Personal expenses (souvenirs).

*   Gratuities for the guide(s).

**Ecotour Time:**

*   We will pick you up at your hotel in Lijiang at 9:00 AM.

*   After the ecotour, we will send you back to your hotel at around 8:00 PM.

title.text: Ready to Join the Forever Walk?

seo.metaDescription: Relive Paul Salopek's "Out of Eden Walk" as documented in NatGeo's "Forever Walk: China"! Explore Jade Dragon Snow Mountain & Wenhai Wetlands on our slow trekking ecotour in Yunnan. Book now!

metaTags.content: ecotour, Yunnan, China, trekking, hiking, slow travel, National Geographic, Forever Walk China, Jade Dragon Snow Mountain, Wenhai Wetlands, Naxi culture, Yi culture, biodiversity, nature tour, cultural tour, village stay, guided tour, adventure travel, China travel, Yunnan travel, Paul Salopek, Out of Eden Walk, Lijiang

pageProps.query:
query Page($relativePath: String!) {
          page(relativePath: $relativePath) {
            __typename
            title
            slug
            type
            genericSection {
              title
              subtitle
              text
              imageUrl
              imageAlt
              badgeLabel
              button1Label
              button1Url
              button2Label
              button2Url
              button3Label
              button3Url
              colors
            }
            featuredSection {
              title
              subtitle
              variant
              colors
            }
            featuredItem1 {
              title
              subtitle
              text
              imageUrl
              imageAlt
            }
            featuredItem2 {
              title
              subtitle
              text
              imageUrl
              imageAlt
            }
            featuredItem3 {
              title
              subtitle
              text
              imageUrl
              imageAlt
            }
            ctaSection {
              title
              subtitle
              text
              buttonLabel
              buttonUrl
              colors
            }
            contactSection {
              title
              subtitle
              text
              buttonLabel
              buttonUrl
            }
            seo {
              metaTitle
              metaDescription
              addTitleSuffix
              socialImage
            }
            isDraft
            _sys {
              filename
              relativePath
              path
            }
          }
        }
